description: Court register fragment. Join: Matthew Dudley. Dated Kislev 5480 AM in one entry, which is 1719 CE. (the dating info in FGP is incorrect). Verso: sale of a one-year tax-farming partnership within the Ottoman customs house of Old Cairo (Fusṭāṭ). The transaction involves many parties: Yahūda Provensal, Yiṣḥaq Foa, Moshe Salāma, Yiṣḥaq Menaḥem, Shemuʾel Arditi, Moshe Arditi, and al-Emīr Muḥammad Yerek Katkhūda of the Mustaḥfiẓān janissary corps.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
